reviews.review_title: This is what I expect from VR titles
reviews.review_description: You just connect and jump into the action. Very funny! And super cool mechanics

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review!

reviews.review_description: Really cool game! I really like the punch controls and the way time slows down. It’s so rewarding to do a slow motion uppercut and watch the bad guy go flying! I hope the developer will keep adding to the game, as it was very quick to play through and the endless mode gets a bit repetitive with the npcs appearing in the same spots in mostly the same order. It’d be great if the npcs spawned in different random areas so it wasn’t as predictable, maybe approaching from behind sometimes as well. Even with that, still a great game. I feel like with a few more additions, this would be up there with some of my favorite games.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review and feedback!

reviews.review_description: This game makes you feel powerful. Getting to guide in slow motion my hand-missile perfectly into the noggin of a robot/samurai/pirate/cowboy was a feeling I didn't know I needed so badly until this day. Finished the whole thing in one sitting, I couldn't put it down. Controlling the hands takes a couple punches to get the hang of, but once you get it you feel unstoppable.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review!

reviews.review_description:
The gameplay is very fun and addictive, I beat all the levels after 2 sessions. This game gets super intense and you work up a real sweat.

I look forward to harder levels!! Keep up the amazing work Devs!

One thing I would improve on is the endless run. It would be better if it continuously got harder and at the end it shows how many enemies you defeated.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review and feedback!

reviews.review_description: Awesome game, innovative, can't wait for the second iteration!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review!

reviews.review_title: One of the best VR games I've played!
reviews.review_description: I got this game on a whim, because I thought it looked fun when I saw screenshots posted on social media. I got up this morning and decided to play it, and suddenly I was hooked!! Once you start mastering the throw and you understand how it works, you can really start honing your skills and climbing the leaderboard! I even managed to get 4th place on a level. I joined the discord and gave what little feedback I could to the devs but all I will say here is this, you can throw the fists, you can also control the fists after you throw it. Use your slow motion sparingly as you want to basically only use it to dodge bullets last second or line up a shot. Now go play the game!!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review!

reviews.review_description:
Its just a simple mechanic that makes this game so fun and its smooth as butter and does'nt drain the battery alot. The modifiers made it 10 times better because i could just do a barrage and its really fun. Keep going and make this game a masterpiece ( its already a masterpiece) 

Some thing i would love to see in the game:

On/off hand trail option

Hand skin customization

Hand trail customization

A type of enemy or boss that takes more than 1 punch

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! I will make sure to take your feedback into account when planning future updates :)

reviews.review_description:
This is still in development so I'm giving them the  benefit of the doubt, I think it's gonna be great when it's done.

UPDATE:  I see the dev has replied, but I don't know how to reply to their reply!  Hopefully they will see it here.

I found that I wasn't able to consistently launch my fist, sometimes trying 2 or 3 times before it would actually fly off.  When it works right tho, it feels AMAZING!  That was my only problem, but as the central mechanic I thought it was worth mentioning.  It's a GREAT concept, and I have enjoyed it so far!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! Is there anything in particular that you've found wrong with the controls? I am planning on adding a slight aim assist system

reviews.review_description: I love the concept of this game. I had a lot of fun while playing and I'm waiting for new updates!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, I hope to improve the game a lot in future updates :)

reviews.review_description: It's one of the games "easy to learn, hard to master". For this moment it doesn't have too many lvl's, but each one of them requires a decent amount of attepts to beat them (at least on higher levels). Beside my frustration of being too slow it gives me a lot of workout and fun (after 20-40 minutes of playing shortness of breath is nearly guaranteed). I highly recommend it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! Judging by your leaderboards score you did manage to master the game quite well :)

reviews.review_description: I hope you will have a lot of fun with this title! If you have any feedback please let me know and I will try my best to address it as soon as I can.

developer_response.body: <Giving yourself a medal meme here>

reviews.review_description: It’s a good game, can’t be denied. A nice little surprise. It’s a bit of a workout, it’s hard, and it’s quick to pick up and put down. Even when you die there’s no wasting time, straight back in again.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review!

reviews.review_description:
Love the idea, little bit of a workout, difficulty balance was perfect. 

Super fun to throw the punch, slow down time and guide the hand around!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review!

reviews.review_description: The concept is so silly and I absolutely love it. You can control your punches after they’re thrown, combine that with slow motion and it’s incredibly satisfying. Covered in sweat and laughing the whole time, plus the game has a plethora of modifiers and an endless mode. Feels like playing Superhot for the first time again.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review!

reviews.review_description:
It's satisfying when you figure out how to throw the punches correctly (slow throw, aim with your pointer knuckle, smooth movement only!), and the workout aspect becomes mostly legs/core through dodging. The slow-mo mechanic is awesome.

That said, I ran through the whole game in about a half hour total end to end, tried training, tried endless mode and it felt repetitive very quickly. There aren't many scenes, which is fine, but the locations of the enemies remain roughly fixed, so you can immediately know from the first moment where everyone will be. Endless mode even cycles through all the maps, including those that have only very few enemies running out, rather than letting it get progressively harder (or stay at a set intensity). 

For replayability, I suggest they populate every map with a few hundred possible spawn points and then randomly select from these when spawning enemies so the game stays surprising and fun. It also wouldn't hurt to have a variety of objects (trains, barrels, houses, etc) so they could auto-generate maps. 

I would need to have more content and randomization to come back to this game in the long term.. I feel I've basically memorized everything already, so I'll be returning it and stick to pistol whip for my leg day. I may come back to this game after more content is added.

For the price though, 5 stars. I could see spending like 5-10 hours on this game before it becomes totally lifeless.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review and feedback!

reviews.review_description:
At first I thought this game was gonna be like those other games that just is repetitive but no, this game surprisingly kept me coming back for some more brawling action. The way you can control your fist mid-air is AMAZING, and the main mechanic of shooting your fist instead of punching them is also great, overall a 5 star

GET THIS GAME!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review!

reviews.review_title: Throwing Punches is Basically a RaymanVR
reviews.review_description:
Throwing Punches is a game where you are put into waves of enemies in nice looking environments and your only weapon is your projectile punches. You can punch with either or both hands and your hands can be directed by turning the controller after unleashing the punch. You are also able to press any of the 4 main face buttons to slow down time and believe me with all the bullets you will be dodging your going to need to take a page out of Neos book and pull some moves straight out of the matrix. With that being said it makes the game great exercise as it gets your whole body stretching and moving and its a lot of fun. Perhaps the price tag might be a little much for the content but I personally loved this enough I think its worth it. 

Video Review with 4K gameplay : https://youtu.be/CP5AHODcF98

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review and video gameplay!

reviews.review_description: When Rayman meets Superhot :-) I am trully amazed of the concept, gameplay and difficilty(as a noob). It's nice workout too. I will definitely stay here for a while. Kudos!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review!

reviews.review_title: Mix of all my favorite games
reviews.review_description: This game concept will be copied by many. Definitely on the right track to an amazing full release.Worth 5 bucks and will gladly pay for more updates.

developer_response.body: Luckily future updates are going to be free :) I hope to release new levels soon!

reviews.review_title: One of the best VR games I’ve played
reviews.review_description:
What I love about VR are those games that bring a new element of, it’s simple but it works so well, because it’s VR. 
The game really keeps you on your feet with your reflexes and mastering the throwing fist. Was super fun and replay-able.

Definitely worth the money and can’t wait for more updates/features!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! I am working on adding more features and bug fixes as fast as I can :)
